titles.title: Let all Mortal flesh keep silence

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Let all mortal flesh keep silence And with fear and trembling stand Ponder nothing earthly minder For with blessing in His hand Christ our God to earth descendeth And full homage to demand

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: King of kings yet born of Mary As of old on earth He stood Lord of lords in human vesture In the body and the blood He will give to all the faithful His own self for heavenly food

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Rank of rank the host of heaven Spread its vanguard on the way As the light of light descendeth From the realms of endless day That the pow'r of hell may vanish As the darkness clears away

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: At his feet the six-winged seraph Cherubim with sleepless eye Veil their faces to the presence As with ceaseless voice they cry Alleluia, alleluia! Alleluia, Lord most high!
